title: eryngium beckii
intro: Eryngium beckii, also known as Cornish sea lavender, is a flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in coastal areas of Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Eryngium beckii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Eryngium beckii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal blends to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
